testcase.name: test_08_final_price_reflects_raw_material_changes

failure.message: AssertionError: Final price formula incorrect! Expected ratio ~2.112, got 2.006 assert 0.10560688890338588 < 0.01 + where 0.10560688890338588 = abs((2.0063931110966142 - 2.112))

testcase.failure: tests/test_price_update_bug.py:346: in test_08_final_price_reflects_raw_material_changes assert abs(actual_ratio - expected_ratio) < 0.01, \ E AssertionError: Final price formula incorrect! Expected ratio ~2.112, got 2.006 E assert 0.10560688890338588 < 0.01 E + where 0.10560688890338588 = abs((2.0063931110966142 - 2.112))

testcase.name: test_15_locking_ring_cost_update

failure.message: AssertionError: Locking ring update not reflected! Expected diff ~28, got 0.0 assert 28.0 < 1 + where 28.0 = abs((0.0 - 28))

testcase.failure: tests/test_price_update_bug.py:602: in test_15_locking_ring_cost_update assert abs(actual_diff - expected_diff) < 1, \ E AssertionError: Locking ring update not reflected! Expected diff ~28, got 0.0 E assert 28.0 < 1 E + where 28.0 = abs((0.0 - 28))
